content: Dataset scoping bug: GitHub issue #1023 confirms search() with datasets= parameter returns results from OTHER datasets — dataset filtering is broken. This is critical for PatchPilot's forget→re-search demo: forgetting dataset workarounds_v1_9 may not change GRAPH_COMPLETION output if search leaks across all datasets. Per MCP-client scoping docs: dataset_name param defaults to main_dataset; ENABLE_BACKEND_ACCESS_CONTROL (default true) creates per-dataset Kuzu+LanceDB. forget(dataset=X, everything=False) deletes across all three stores for that dataset. Surgical forget works at the datasets.delete_data() level, not via prune_ which is global.
